creator: gparedes@eddas.com.pe
text:
The zaptel driver dont detect the TE122P, i will do some tests with the TE120 and work fine but not with the TE122P, in the manual of the card tell some about the zaptel driver work with Zaptel 1.4.8 but the port are with zaptel-1.4.6_5. and need be updated 

Best Regards

Guillermo Paredes - EDDAS

Fix: 

updatng the version of the source of zaptel
How-To-Repeat: Just install the /usr/ports/misc/zaptel and put in the computer a TE122P in the computer, this card appear only in the dmesg -a but the driver dont mach.
